title: CSC Policy Profile v0.1
description: Schema for CSC policy profile files. Validates policy structure on load. Policy files with duplicate keys MUST be rejected before validation, as defined in docs/canonicalization.md.

policy_schema_version.description: Policy schema identifier. Must match the version this file was authored against.

name.description: Human-readable policy profile name. Used as policy_profile in decisions and receipts.

allow_commands.description: Allowlisted executable names. Commands not in this list are denied.

deny_argv_prefixes.description: Denied argv prefix patterns. Each entry is an array of strings matched against the beginning of argv.

allowed_effect_types.description: Allowed proposed effect types. Commands with effect types not in this list are denied.

manual_approval_for_classified_effect_ty.description: Classified effect types that require manual approval. These may include extension-defined types not in the core proposed_effect_type enum.

allowed_risk_classes.description: Allowed contract risk classes. Contracts with risk classes not in this list are denied.

max_timeout_sec.description: Maximum allowed timeout in seconds for any single command.

network.description: Maximum network access mode allowed. Commands requesting higher access are denied.

allow_secret_refs.description: Whether commands may reference secrets. If false, any command with non-empty secret_refs is denied.

require_write_paths_empty.description: If true, commands with non-empty write_paths are denied. Enforced before write path prefix validation.

allowed_cwd_prefixes.description: Allowed working directory prefixes. Commands with cwd outside these prefixes are denied.

allowed_read_prefixes.description: Allowed read path prefixes. Declared read paths outside these prefixes are denied.

allowed_write_prefixes.description: Allowed write path prefixes. Declared write paths outside these prefixes are denied. Ignored when require_write_paths_empty is true.

allowed_egress_hosts.description: Allowed egress hostnames when network is allowlisted. Used by policy classification in v0.1. OS/runtime enforcement of egress requires hardened mode.

absolutePath.description: An absolute filesystem path (POSIX, Windows drive letter, or UNC).
